report.hypothesis: Introducing aromatic residues at position 5 and hydrophobic residues at position 11 will enhance SSTR2-specific interactions with ECL2/TM5 while reducing off-target affinity to SSTR3/5.

report.hypothesis: The current design strategy is insufficient to achieve SSTR2 selectivity. A focused mutation strategy targeting conserved off-target interaction sites is necessary to improve Δmargin and achieve the primary objective.

proposed_changes.rationale: To disrupt conserved pocket contacts in SSTR3/SSTR5 while preserving pharmacophore positions 7-10 and Cys3/Cys14.
Introduce charged or polar residues at conserved off-target interaction sites to disrupt SSTR3/SSTR5 binding while maintaining SSTR2 selectivity.
